params.theme: AI Last Mile Problem — three reasons more tokens won't deploy AI: 1) Print & merch AI makes beautiful raster art but forgets bleed lines, spot colors, vector closures, CMYK profiles 2) 3D molding AI generates appealing concepts but not draft angles, draft-safe topology, STEP files for CNC 3) Compliance AI summarizes contracts well but misses jurisdiction-specific filing rules and signature workflows
